jsonld.name: Counterfactual Horizon Distance
jsonld.description: The felt temporal and structural distance of unrealized conversation trajectories, ranging from nearby counterfactuals that could easily re-merge with the actual path to distant ghost-conversations that have become parallel universes with their own momentum, permanently separated from actuality.
